_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX14 __wrap_iter operator+(difference_type __n) const _NOEXCEPT { __wrap_iter __w(*this); __w += __n; return __w; } // 重载+= _LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX14 __wrap_iter& operator+=( difference_type __n) _NOEXCEPT { _LIBCPP_DEBUG_ASSERT( __get_const_db()->__addable(this, __n), "Attempted to add/subtract an iterator outside its valid range"); __i_ += __n; return *this; } // 重载- _LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX14 __wrap_iter operator-(difference_type __n) const _NOEXCEPT { return *this + (-__n); } // 重载-= _LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX14 __wrap_iter& operator-=( difference_type __n) _NOEXCEPT { *this += -__n; return *this; } // 索引 _LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX14 reference operator[](difference_type __n) const _NOEXCEPT { _LIBCPP_DEBUG_ASSERT( __get_const_db()->__subscriptable(this, __n), "Attempted to subscript an iterator outside its valid range"); return __i_[__n]; } // 返回base _LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX14 iterator_type base() const _NOEXCEPT { return __i_; }};template <class _Iter1>_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR bool operator==( const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __x, const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __y) _NOEXCEPT { return __x.base() == __y.base();}template <class _Iter1, class _Iter2>_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR bool operator==( const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __x, const __wrap_iter<_Iter2>& __y) _NOEXCEPT { return __x.base() == __y.base();}template <class _Iter1>_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX14 bool operator<( const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __x, const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __y) _NOEXCEPT { _LIBCPP_DEBUG_ASSERT(__get_const_db()->__less_than_comparable( _VSTD::addressof(__x), _VSTD::addressof(__y)), "Attempted to compare incomparable iterators"); return __x.base() < __y.base();}template <class _Iter1, class _Iter2>_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX14 bool operator<( const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __x, const __wrap_iter<_Iter2>& __y) _NOEXCEPT { _LIBCPP_DEBUG_ASSERT(__get_const_db()->__less_than_comparable(&__x, &__y), "Attempted to compare incomparable iterators"); return __x.base() < __y.base();}template <class _Iter1>_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR bool operator!=( const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __x, const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __y) _NOEXCEPT { return !(__x == __y);}template <class _Iter1, class _Iter2>_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR bool operator!=( const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __x, const __wrap_iter<_Iter2>& __y) _NOEXCEPT { return !(__x == __y);}template <class _Iter1>_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR bool operator>( const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __x, const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __y) _NOEXCEPT { return __y < __x;}template <class _Iter1, class _Iter2>_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR bool operator>( const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __x, const __wrap_iter<_Iter2>& __y) _NOEXCEPT { return __y < __x;}template <class _Iter1>_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR bool operator>=( const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __x, const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __y) _NOEXCEPT { return !(__x < __y);}template <class _Iter1, class _Iter2>_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR bool operator>=( const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __x, const __wrap_iter<_Iter2>& __y) _NOEXCEPT { return !(__x < __y);}template <class _Iter1>_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR bool operator<=( const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __x, const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __y) _NOEXCEPT { return !(__y < __x);}template <class _Iter1, class _Iter2>_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR bool operator<=( const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __x, const __wrap_iter<_Iter2>& __y) _NOEXCEPT { return !(__y < __x);}template <class _Iter1, class _Iter2>_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX14#ifndef _LIBCPP_CXX03_LANG auto operator-(const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __x, const __wrap_iter<_Iter2>& __y) _NOEXCEPT->decltype(__x.base() - __y.base())#else typename __wrap_iter<_Iter1>::difference_type operator-(const __wrap_iter<_Iter1>& __x, const __wrap_iter<_Iter2>& __y) _NOEXCEPT#endif // C++03{ _LIBCPP_DEBUG_ASSERT(__get_const_db()->__less_than_comparable( _VSTD::addressof(__x), _VSTD::addressof(__y)), "Attempted to subtract incompatible iterators"); return __x.base() - __y.base();}template <class _Iter1>_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX14 __wrap_iter<_Iter1>operator+(typename __wrap_iter<_Iter1>::difference_type __n, __wrap_iter<_Iter1> __x) _NOEXCEPT { __x += __n; return __x;}#if _LIBCPP_STD_VER <= 17template <class _It>struct __is_cpp17_contiguous_iterator<__wrap_iter<_It> > : true_type {};#endif// 偏特化`pointer_traits`template <class _It>struct _LIBCPP_TEMPLATE_VIS pointer_traits<__wrap_iter<_It> > { typedef __wrap_iter<_It> pointer; typedef typename pointer_traits<_It>::element_type element_type; typedef typename pointer_traits<_It>::difference_type difference_type; _LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR static element_type* to_address( pointer __w) _NOEXCEPT { return _VSTD::__to_address(__w.base()); }}; 2. back_inserter_iterator Defined in header <iterator> C++17之前 123template< class Container >class back_insert_iterator : public std::iterator<std::output_iterator_tag, void, void, void, void> C++17之后 12template< class Container >class back_insert_iterator; std::back_insert_iterator is a LegacyOutputIterator that appends elements to a container for which it was constructed. The container’s push_back() member function is called whenever the iterator (whether dereferenced or not) is assigned to. Incrementing the std::back_insert_iterator is a no-op. 本质就是持有容器指针，重载了operator =，赋值则调用容器的push_back方法。 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566// C++17之前从iterator继承template <class _Container>class _LIBCPP_TEMPLATE_VIS back_insert_iterator#if _LIBCPP_STD_VER <= 14 || !defined(_LIBCPP_ABI_NO_ITERATOR_BASES) : public iterator<output_iterator_tag, void, void, void, void>#endif{ protected: _Container* container; public: typedef output_iterator_tag iterator_category; typedef void value_type;#if _LIBCPP_STD_VER > 17 typedef ptrdiff_t difference_type;#else typedef void difference_type;#endif typedef void pointer; typedef void reference; typedef _Container container_type; // 持有指向容器的指针 _LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX20 explicit back_insert_iterator( _Container& __x) : container(_VSTD::addressof(__x)) {} _LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX20 back_insert_iterator& operator=(const typename _Container::value_type& __value) { container->push_back(__value); return *this; }#ifndef _LIBCPP_CXX03_LANG _LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX20 back_insert_iterator& operator=(typename _Container::value_type&& __value) { container->push_back(_VSTD::move(__value)); return *this; }#endif // _LIBCPP_CXX03_LANG _LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX20 back_insert_iterator& operator*() { return *this; } _LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX20 back_insert_iterator& operator++() { return *this; } _LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX20 back_insert_iterator operator++(int) { return *this; } _LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX20 _Container* __get_container() const { return container; }};// back_inserter is a convenient function template that constructs a // std::back_insert_iterator for the container c with the type deduced from the type of the argument.template <class _Container>inline _LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_SINCE_CXX20 back_insert_iterator<_Container> back_inserter(_Container& __x) { return back_insert_iterator<_Container>(__x);}

笔记2023/07/21 OOB（out of band数据） epoll三剑客 epoll_create epoll_ctl 需要搞清楚几个参数的具体含义 EPOLLIN EPOLLOUT EPOLLRDHUP EPOLLERR EPOLLET EPOLLPRI EPOLLONESHOT epoll_wait 水平触发和边缘触发 水平触发的主要特点是，如果用户在监听epoll事件，当内核有事件的时候，会拷贝给用户态。但是如果用户只处理了一次，那么剩下没有处理的会在下一次epoll_wait再次返回该事件。 这样如果用户永远不处理这个事件，就导致每次都会有该事件从内核到用户的拷贝，耗费性能。但是水平触发相对安全，最起码事件不会丢掉，除非用户处理完毕。 边缘触发，相对跟水平触发相反，当内核有事件到达， 只会通知用户一次，至于用 户处理还是不处理，以后将不会再通知。这样减少了拷贝过程，增加了性能，但是 相对来说，如果用户马虎忘记处理，将会产生事件丢的情况。 Reactor模式 描述符（handle）：由操作系统提供，用于识别每一个事件，如Socket描述符 同步事件分离器（Demultiplexer）：用来等待一个或多个事件的发生 事件处理器接口（event handler）：由一个或多个模板函数组成的接口 Reactor管理器：定义了一些接口，用于应用程序控制事件调度 2023/7/22 Erlang is no silver bullet and will be particularly bad at things like image and signal processing, operating system device drivers, etc. and will shine at things like large software for server use (i.e.: queues, map-reduce), doing some lifting coupled with other languages, higher-level protocol implementation, etc. Areas in the middle will depend on you. User switch command --> h c [nn] - connect to job i [nn] - interrupt job k [nn] - kill job j - list all jobs s [shell] - start local shell r [node [shell]] - start remote shell q - quit erlang ? | h - this message --> 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829- **Numbers** ```erlang 1> 2 + 15. 17 2> 49 * 100. 4900 3> 1892 - 1472. 420 4> 5/2. 2.5 5> 5 div 2. 2 6> 5 rem 2. 1 8> 5 div 2.0. ** exception error: an error occurred when evaluating an arithmetic expression in operator div/2 called as 5 div 2.0 9> (50*100)-4999. 1 10> -(50*100)-4999. -9999 11> -(50 * 100 - 4999). -1 12> -50 * (100 - 4999). 244950 13> Invariable Variables (note that variables begin with an uppercase letter): 1234567891011121318> One = 1.119> Un = Uno = One = 1.120> Two = One + One.221> Two = 2.222> Two = Two + 1.** exception error: no match of right hand side value 323> two = 2.** exception error: no match of right hand side value 224> Atoms There is a reason why variables names can’t begin with a lowercase character: atoms. Atoms are literals, constants with their own name for value. 123456789101> atom.atom2> atoms_rule.atoms_rule3> atoms_rule@erlang.atoms_rule@erlang4> 'Atoms can be cheated!'.'Atoms can be cheated!'5> atom = 'atom'.atom An atom should be enclosed in single quotes (‘) if it does not begin with a lower-case letter or if it contains other characters than alphanumeric characters, underscore (_), or @.Expression 5 also shows that an atom with single quotes is exactly the same as a similar atom without them. Don’t drink too much Kool-Aid:Atoms are really nice and a great way to send messages or represent constants. However there are pitfalls to using atoms for too many things: an atom is referred to in an “atom table” which consumes memory (4 bytes/atom in a 32-bit system, 8 bytes/atom in a 64-bit system). The atom table is not garbage collected, and so atoms will accumulate until the system tips over, either from memory usage or because 1048577 atoms were declared. This means atoms should not be generated dynamically for whatever reason; if your system has to be reliable and user input lets someone crash it at will by telling it to create atoms, you’re in serious trouble. Atoms should be seen as tools for the developer because honestly, it’s what they are. Note: some atoms are reserved words and can not be used except for what the language designers wanted them to be: function names, operators, expressions, etc. These are: after and andalso band begin bnot bor bsl bsr bxor case catch cond div end fun if let not of or orelse query receive rem try when xor 2023/7/25 C++17 Defines several standard resources: new_delete_resource(): Allocates using ::operator new null_memory_resource(): Throws on allocation synchronized_pool_resource: Thread-safe pools of similar-sized memory blocks unsynchronized_pool_resource: Non-thread-safe pools of similar-sized memory blocks monotonic_buffer_resource: Super-fast, non-thread-safe allocation into a buffer with do-nothing deallocation A memory resource for testing We will build a new memory resource for testing purposes which will Keep track of amount of how much memory is allocated, deallocated, and a high-water mark for memory outstanding. Check that every deallocation matches an allocation. Check for memory leaks - any memory still allocated when the resource’s destructor is called is considered leaked. 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475class test_resource : public pmr::memory_resource {public: explicit test_resource(pmr::memory_resource* parent = pmr::get_default_resource()); ~test_resource(); pmr::memory_resource *parent() ocnst; size_t bytes_allocated() const; size_t bytes_deallocated() const; size_t bytes_outstanding() const; size_t bytes_highwater() const; size_t blocks_outstanding() const; static size_t leaked_bytes(); static size_t leaked_blocks(); static void clear_leaked(); protected: void* do_allocated(size_t bytes, size_t alignment) override; void do_deallocate(void* p, size_t bytes, size_t alignment) override; bool do_is_equal(const pmr::memory_resource& other) const noexcept override; private: // Record holding the results of an allocation struct allocation_res { void* m_ptr; size_t m_bytes; size_t m_alignment; }; pmr::memory_resource* m_parent; size_t m_bytes_allocated; size_t m_bytes_outstanding; size_t m_bytes_highwater; pmr::vector<allocation_res> m_blocks; static size_t s_leaked_bytes; static size_t s_leaked_blocks;};void* test_resource::do_allocate(size_t bytes, size_t alignment) { void* ret = m_parent->allocate(bytes, alignment); m_blocks.push_back(allocation_rec{ret, bytes, alignment}); m_bytes_allocated += bytes; m_bytes_outstanding += bytes; if (m_bytes_outstanding > m_bytes_highwater) { m_bytes_highwater = m_bytes_outstanding; } return ret;}void test_resource::do_deallocate(void* p, size_t bytes, size_t alignment) { // Check that deallocation args exactly match allocation args. auto i = std::find_if(m_blocks.begin(), m_blocks.end(), [p](allocation_rec& r) { return r.m_ptr == p; }); if (i == m_blocks.end()) { throw std::invalid_argument("deallocate: Invalid pointer"); } else if (i->m_bytes != bytes) { throw std::invalid_argument("deallocate: size mismatch"); } else if (i->m_alignment != alignment) { throw std::invalid_argument("deallocate: alignment mismatch"); } m_parent->deallocate(p, i->m_bytes, i->m_alignment); m_blocks.erase(i); m_bytes_outstanding -= bytes;}bool test_resource::do_is_equal(const pmr::memory_resource& other) const noexcept { // Two test resource are equal if they are the same resource. return this == &other;} Summary Creating a new memory resource is as easy as deriving from pmr::memory_resource. Override do_allocate() and do_deallocate() to do the real work. Override do_is_equal() to test for equality. In most cases return this == &other (identity equality) is sufficient If there is no resource-specific state, return true is correct. In rare cases, something more complex is needed. Example slist<Tp> is a sequence container like list<Tp> and vector<Tp>. Supports push_back/front, emplace_back/front, front, emplace, insert, erase, pop_front, begin, end, size, empty, swap. Implemented as a singly-linked list with a sentinel at the head.  <typename Tp>struct node;// Base class holds no value.template <typename Tp>struct node_base { node<Tp>* m_next; node_base() : m_next(nullptr) {} node_base(const node_base&) = delete; node_base operator=(const node_base&) = delete;};// Derived class holds value.template <typename Tp>struct node : node_base<Tp> { // Value nested in union suppressed constructor invocation union { Tp m_value; };};template <typename Tp>class slist {public: using value_type = Tp; using reference = value_type&; using const_reference = value_type const&; using difference_type = std::ptrdiff_t; using size_type = std::size_t; using allocator_type = pmr::polymorphic_allocator<byte>; using iterator = ...; using const_iterator = ...; // Constructors slist(allocator_type a = {}) : m_head(), m_tail_p(&m_head), m_size(0), m_allocator(a) {} // Every constructor has an variant taking an allocator slist(const slist& other, allocator_type a = {}); slist(slist&& other); slist(slist&& other, allocator_type a); private: node_base m_head; // sentinel node node_base* m_tail_p; // pointer to last node size_t m_size; allocator_type m_allocator;};// Secret sauce #1:// Allocate a node, then construct a value within it.// 思考为什么用construct而不是placement new// addressof可以避免重载的&template <typename Tp>template <typename... Args>typename slist<Tp>::iteratorslist<Tp>::emplace(iterator i, Args&&... args) { node* new_node = static_cast<node*>( m_allocator.resource()->allocate(sizeof(node), alignof(node))); m_allocator.construct(std::addressof(new_node->m_value), std::forward<Args>(args)...); new_node->m_next = i.m_prev->m_next; i.m_prev->m_next = new_node; if (i.m_prev == m_tail_p) { m_tail_p = new_node; } ++m_size; return i;}template <typename Tp>typename slist<Tp>::iteratorslist<Tp>::erase(iterator b, iterator e) { node* erase_next = b.m_prev->m_next; node* erase_past = e.m_prev->m_next; // Erasing at tail if (nullptr == erase_past) { m_tail_p = b.m_prev; } // Splice out sublist b.m_prev->m_next = erase_past; while (erase_next != erase_past) { node* old_node = erase_next; erase_next = erase_next->m_next; --m_size; // Secret sauce #2 // Destroyc value within node, then deallocate the node. m_allocator.destroy(std::addressof(old_node->m_value)); m_allocator.resource()->deallocate(old_node, sizeof(node), alignof(node)); } return b;}template <typename Tp>slist<Tp.& slist<Tp>::operator=(const slist& other) { if (&otehr == this) { return *this; } erase(begin(), end()); for (const Tp& v : other) { push_back(v); } return *this;}template <typename Tp>slist<Tp>& slist<Tp>::operator=(slist&& other) { if (m_allocator == other.m_allocator) { // non-copying move // Don't movbe the allocator. // Never change the allocator of an existing object! swap(other); } else { // Copy assign operator=(other); } return *this;}// Do not propagate other allocator on copy construction.template <typename Tp>slist<Tp>::slist(const slist& other, allocator_type a) : slist(a) { operator=(other); }// Always propagate other allocator on regular move constrution.template <typename Tp>slist<Tp>::slist(slist&& other) : slist(other.get_allocator()) { operator=(std::move(other)); }// Do not propagate other allocator on extended move construction.template <typename Tp>slist<Tp>::slist(slist&& other, allocator_type a) : slist(a) { operator=(std::move(other)); } 参考 lear you some Erlang for great good! CppCon 2017: Pablo Halpern “Allocators: The Good Parts” 2023/07/261. strace​ https://ipcmen.com/strace 2. 使用cut按列切分文件​ cut命令可以按列，而不是按行来切分文件。该命令可用于处理使用固定宽度字段的文件，CSV文件或是由空格分隔的文件（例如标准日志文件）。 实战演练 选项-f可以指定要提取的字段 12# 该命令将显示第2列和第3列$ cut -f 2, 3 filename cut命令也能够从stdin中读取输入 123456789101112131415161718$ cat student_data.txt No Name Mark Percent1 Sarath 45 902 Alex 49 983 Anu 45 90$ cut -f1 student_data.txt No123# 多个字段用逗号隔开$ cut -f2,4 student_data.txtName PercentSarath 90Alex 98Anu 90 3. sed命令​ sed是stream editor（流编辑器）的缩写。它最常见的用法是进行文本替换。sed可以使用另一个字符串来替换匹配模式。模式可以是简单的字符串或正则表达式。 1$ sed 's/pattern/replace_string/' file sed也可以从stdin读取输入 1$ cat file | sed 's/pattern/replace_string/' 4. smart pointerF.7: For general use, take T* or T& arguments rather than smart pointersReasonPassing a smart pointer transfers or shares ownership and should only be used when ownership semantics are intended. A function that does not manipulate lifetime should take raw pointers or references instead. Passing by smart pointer restricts the use of a function to callers that use smart pointers. A function that needs a widget should be able to accept any widget object, not just ones whose lifetimes are managed by a particular kind of smart pointer. Passing a shared smart pointer (e.g., std::shared_ptr) implies a run-time cost. Example1234567891011121314// accepts any int*void f(int*);// can only accept ints for which you want to transfer ownershipvoid g(unique_ptr<int>);// can only accept ints for which you are willing to share ownershipvoid g(shared_ptr<int>);// doesn't change ownership, but requires a particular ownership of the callervoid h(const unique_ptr<int>&);// accepts any intvoid h(int&); Example, bad1234567891011121314// calleevoid f(shared_ptr<widget>& w){ // ... use(*w); // only use of w -- the lifetime is not used at all // ...};// callershared_ptr<widget> my_widget = /* ... */;f(my_widget);widget stack_widget;f(stack_widget); // error Example, good1234567891011121314// calleevoid f(widget& w){ // ... use(w); // ...};// callershared_ptr<widget> my_widget = /* ... */;f(*my_widget);widget stack_widget;f(stack_widget); // ok -- now this works NoteWe can catch many common cases of dangling pointers statically (see lifetime safety profile). Function arguments naturally live for the lifetime of the function call, and so have fewer lifetime problems. Enforcement (Simple) Warn if a function takes a parameter of a smart pointer type (that overloads operator-> or operator*) that is copyable but the function only calls any of: operator*, operator-> or get(). Suggest using a T* or T& instead. Flag a parameter of a smart pointer type (a type that overloads operator-> or operator*) that is copyable/movable but never copied/moved from in the function body, and that is never modified, and that is not passed along to another function that could do so. That means the ownership semantics are not used. Suggest using a T* or T& instead. See also: Prefer T* over T& when “no argument” is a valid option Smart pointer rule summary 5. 关于FetchContent_Declare需要再看下

posts.title: 常用命令
posts.text: Docker1. 常用命令1.1 镜像类命令 显示本地Docker主机上存在的所有镜像，包括镜像的仓库、标签、镜像 ID、创建时间和大小等信息 1234567$ docker imagesREPOSITORY TAG IMAGE ID CREATED SIZEfoundationdb/build centos7-latest 96999db00d02 2 months ago 18.3GB<none> <none> ffc5020d7977 2 months ago 5.89GBmygrpc latest d388d40abf6d 2 months ago 4.39GBarm64v8/ubuntu latest fabf3a8d4949 10 months ago 98.8MBubuntu latest 5a81c4b8502e 20 months ago 77.8MB 从Docker Hub（或其他配置的 Docker 镜像仓库）中搜索公开的镜像 123$ docker search foundationdb/buildNAME DESCRIPTION STARS OFFICIAL AUTOMATEDfoundationdb/build Images for compiling FoundationDB, used by C… 4 下载指定的镜像及其标签。如果镜像不存在本地，Docker会从远程仓库中拉取镜像 1$ docker pull <image_name> 查看Docker本地存储的所有镜像、容器、卷和构建缓存的占用空间 123456$ docker system dfTYPE TOTAL ACTIVE SIZE RECLAIMABLEImages 5 3 24.31GB 5.987GB (24%)Containers 3 0 2.574GB 2.574GB (100%)Local Volumes 3 1 92B 92B (100%)Build Cache 54 0 4.175kB 4.175kB 删除一个或多个Docker镜像。注意，这不会删除正在使用该镜像的容器。 1$ docker rmi <image_id_or_name> 将运行中的容器的当前状态（包括文件系统的更改）保存为一个新的镜像。可以指定新的镜像名称和标签。 1$ docker commit <container_id> <new_image_name> 将本地镜像推送到远程仓库（如Docker Hub） 1$ docker push <image_name> 重新命名（或者说标记）一个已有的Docker镜像 1$ docker tag 删除所有未被使用的镜像 12345678$ docker image pruneWARNING! This will remove all dangling images.Are you sure you want to continue? [y/N] yDeleted Images:deleted: sha256:ffc5020d7977c220ed97d9c3a834d26917197277158815f350e3f844e69b4b3ddeleted: sha256:32406d6f962e44fe5f945f05c45495e487818217d8c8a0a6748744b90849cf32Total reclaimed space: 1.496GB 删除所有未使用的镜像、容器、网络和挂载的卷 1- docker system prune 1.2 容器命令 --name为容器指定名字 -i表示交互式 -t表示伪终端 123456789101112131415161718# 基于ubuntu镜像启动一个新容器# -it选项使容器以交互模式运行（-i保持标准输入流，-t为容器分配一个伪终端）# 并运行/bin/bash，进入bash shelldocker run -it ubuntu /bin/bash# 列出当前正在运行的容器docker ps# 删除一个停止的容器docker rm <container_id># 启动一个已停止的容器docker start <container_id># 停止一个正在运行的容器docker stop <container_id># 查看容器的日志# 该命令用于获取容器的标准输出（stdout）和标准错误（stderr）docker logs <container_id># 查看容器的详细信息# 该命令返回容器的详细 JSON 格式信息，包括容器的配置、网络设置、挂载的卷、环境变量等docker inspect <container_id> Example 1当你使用docker start启动一个之前停止的容器时，它只是启动了容器的后台进程，而不会自动连接到标准输入（stdin）。为了进入容器的交互模式，你可以使用docker exec命令。 下面是一些基本的步骤： 启动容器： 1docker start -i <container_id> 这将启动之前停止的容器，并且-i选项保持标准输入打开，使其处于交互模式。 进入容器： 1docker exec -it <container_id> /bin/bash 这将让你进入正在运行的容器的交互模式。 -i选项保持标准输入打开，-t选项分配一个伪终端。 2. 如果想重新启动已有容器启动已存在的容器（docker start）并附加到终端： 12345bash复制代码docker start -ai 5d4304c2b9 3. 如果想进入已停止的容器中执行命令启动已存在的容器，并以交互模式执行 /bin/bash： 123456bash复制代码docker start 5d4304c2b9docker exec -it 5d4304c2b9 /bin/bash 4. 如果容器已经运行，但想连接到终端连接到正在运行的容器的终端： 1docker attach 5d4304c2b9 需要区分docker attach和docker exec的区别 docker attach之后exit会停止容器 主机与容器之间的文件拷贝docker cp docker export docker import 制作镜像docker commit 退出容器 exit等同于Ctrl+D Ctrl+p+q 在 Docker 中，exit 和 Ctrl + P + Q 是两种不同的方式来退出容器的交互模式，它们有一些区别： exit 命令： 当你在容器内输入 exit 命令时，它会终止当前 shell 进程，导致容器停止并退出。 这个操作将结束容器的主进程，因此整个容器会停止运行。 12bashCopy codeexit Ctrl + P + Q 组合键： 使用 Ctrl + P + Q 组合键，你将从容器的交互模式中脱离出来，但容器本身并不会停止。 这种方式实际上是将当前终端的输入焦点从容器移开，使你回到主机的 shell。容器将继续在后台运行。 1Ctrl + P + Q 或者在启动容器时使用 -d 选项： 1docker run -itd ubuntu /bin/bash 这种方式适用于在容器中运行一个服务，同时仍然需要访问主机的终端。 总的来说，如果你希望停止容器并退出，可以使用 exit 命令。如果你只是想退出容器的交互模式而不停止容器，可以使用 Ctrl + P + Q 组合键。 从错误信息来看，docker pull foundationdb/build 失败的原因是 Docker 无法找到 foundationdb/build:latest 的 manifest（清单）。以下是详细解释和解决方法： 1. 什么是 Manifest？在 Docker 中，manifest 是一个描述镜像的元数据文件，它包含了镜像的架构（如 amd64、arm64）、操作系统（如 linux、windows）以及镜像的层信息。 当你运行 docker pull 时，Docker 会首先获取镜像的 manifest，然后根据 manifest 下载对应的镜像层。 如果 manifest 不存在或无法访问，Docker 会返回 manifest unknown 错误。 2. 错误原因 foundationdb/build:latest 不存在： 可能 FoundationDB 官方没有提供 latest 标签的镜像。 或者镜像仓库中没有 foundationdb/build 这个镜像。 镜像仓库问题： 镜像仓库可能无法访问，或者镜像已被删除。 3. 解决方法（1）检查镜像是否存在访问 Docker Hub 查看 foundationdb/build 镜像是否存在： Docker Hub - foundationdb/build 如果镜像不存在，可能需要使用其他镜像或手动构建。 （2）指定镜像标签如果 latest 标签不存在，可以尝试指定其他标签。例如： bash 复制 1docker pull foundationdb/build:7.1.29 你需要查看 FoundationDB 的官方文档或 Docker Hub 页面，找到可用的标签。 （3）手动构建镜像如果官方镜像不可用，可以手动构建 FoundationDB 的 Docker 镜像。 克隆 FoundationDB 的 GitHub 仓库： bash 复制 12git clone https://github.com/apple/foundationdb.gitcd foundationdb 使用提供的 Dockerfile 构建镜像： bash 复制 1docker build -t foundationdb/build . 运行构建的镜像： bash 复制 1docker run -it foundationdb/build /bin/bash （4）使用其他镜像如果 FoundationDB 官方没有提供 Docker 镜像，可以尝试使用其他包含 FoundationDB 依赖的镜像，例如： bash 复制 1docker pull ubuntu:22.04 然后在容器中手动安装 FoundationDB 的依赖项（如 CMake、Mono、Ninja 等）。 4. 总结 错误原因：foundationdb/build:latest 的 manifest 不存在。 解决方法： 检查 Docker Hub 上是否有可用的镜像标签。 手动构建 FoundationDB 的 Docker 镜像。 使用其他基础镜像并手动安装依赖。 如果你有其他问题，请随时告诉我！ foundationdb/build By foundationdb • Updated 22 days ago Images for compiling FoundationDB, used by CI systems Image 从描述来看，foundationdb/build 是 FoundationDB 官方提供的 Docker 镜像，用于编译 FoundationDB，并且被 CI 系统（持续集成系统）使用。然而，你遇到的 manifest unknown 错误表明 Docker Hub 上可能没有 latest 标签的镜像，或者镜像不可用。 以下是解决方法和详细步骤： 1. 检查可用的镜像标签由于 latest 标签不可用，你需要找到可用的镜像标签。可以通过以下方式检查： （1）访问 Docker Hub 页面打开 Docker Hub - foundationdb/build 页面，查看可用的标签。 （2）使用 docker manifest inspect 命令运行以下命令检查可用的 manifest： bash 复制 1docker manifest inspect foundationdb/build 如果命令返回结果，你可以看到支持的架构和标签。例如： json 复制 123456789101112131415{ "schemaVersion": 2, "mediaType": "application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.list.v2+json", "manifests": [ { "mediaType": "application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json", "size": 1234, "digest": "sha256:...", "platform": { "architecture": "amd64", "os": "linux" } } ]} 2. 指定镜像标签如果 latest 标签不可用，可以尝试指定其他标签。例如： bash 复制 1docker pull foundationdb/build:7.1.29 你需要根据 Docker Hub 页面或 FoundationDB 的官方文档找到可用的标签。 3. 手动构建镜像如果官方镜像不可用，可以手动构建 FoundationDB 的 Docker 镜像。 （1）克隆 FoundationDB 的 GitHub 仓库bash 复制 12git clone https://github.com/apple/foundationdb.gitcd foundationdb （2）使用提供的 Dockerfile 构建镜像FoundationDB 的仓库中可能包含用于构建的 Dockerfile。运行以下命令构建镜像： bash 复制 1docker build -t foundationdb/build . （3）运行构建的镜像bash 复制 1docker run -it foundationdb/build /bin/bash 4. 使用其他基础镜像如果 FoundationDB 官方没有提供 Docker 镜像，可以尝试使用其他基础镜像（如 ubuntu:22.04），然后手动安装 FoundationDB 的依赖项。 （1）拉取基础镜像bash 复制 1docker pull ubuntu:22.04 （2）启动容器并安装依赖bash 复制 1docker run -it ubuntu:22.04 /bin/bash 在容器中运行以下命令安装依赖： bash 复制 12apt updateapt install -y cmake mono-complete ninja-build git （3）克隆并构建 FoundationDBbash 复制 123456git clone https://github.com/apple/foundationdb.gitcd foundationdbmkdir buildcd buildcmake ..make 5. 总结 检查可用标签：访问 Docker Hub 页面或使用 docker manifest inspect 命令。 指定标签：使用可用的标签拉取镜像，例如 foundationdb/build:7.1.29。 手动构建镜像：克隆 FoundationDB 仓库并使用 Dockerfile 构建镜像。 使用其他镜像：使用 ubuntu:22.04 等基础镜像，手动安装依赖并构建 FoundationDB。 如果你有其他问题，请随时告诉我！ 参考 Correct way to detach from a container without stopping it

STL之vector最常用的几个方法 访问元素 operator [] front back at 添加元素 push_back emplace_back size empty begin end operator [] 想看下resize会不会默认初始化。 __append函数 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233// Default constructs __n objects starting at __end_// throws if construction throws// Postcondition: size() == size() + __n// Exception safety: strong.template <class _Tp, class _Allocator>void vector<_Tp, _Allocator>::__append(size_type __n) { if (static_cast<size_type>(this->__end_cap() - this->__end_) >= __n) this->__construct_at_end(__n); else { allocator_type& __a = this->__alloc(); __split_buffer<value_type, allocator_type&> __v(__recommend(size() + __n), size(), __a); __v.__construct_at_end(__n); __swap_out_circular_buffer(__v); }}// Default constructs __n objects starting at __end_// throws if construction throws// Postcondition: size() == size() + __n// Exception safety: strong.template <class _Tp, class _Allocator>void vector<_Tp, _Allocator>::__append(size_type __n, const_reference __x) { if (static_cast<size_type>(this->__end_cap() - this->__end_) >= __n) this->__construct_at_end(__n, __x); else { allocator_type& __a = this->__alloc(); __split_buffer<value_type, allocator_type&> __v(__recommend(size() + __n), size(), __a); __v.__construct_at_end(__n, __x); __swap_out_circular_buffer(__v); }} 在__append函数中构造了一个__split_buffer。 12345678910template <class _Tp, class _Allocator>__split_buffer<_Tp, _Allocator>::__split_buffer(size_type __cap, size_type __start, __alloc_rr& __a) : __end_cap_(nullptr, __a) { __first_ = __cap != 0 ? __alloc_traits::allocate(__alloc(), __cap) : nullptr; __begin_ = __end_ = __first_ + __start; __end_cap() = __first_ + __cap;} 123456789101112struct _ConstructTransaction { explicit _ConstructTransaction(pointer* __p, size_type __n) _NOEXCEPT : __pos_(*__p), __end_(*__p + __n), __dest_(__p) {} ~_ConstructTransaction() { *__dest_ = __pos_; } pointer __pos_; const pointer __end_; private: pointer* __dest_;}; 如何构造 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445// file: memory// 检测`_Alloc`是否有construct方法_LIBCPP_SUPPRESS_DEPRECATED_PUSHtemplate <class _Alloc, class... _Args, class = decltype(_VSTD::declval<_Alloc>().construct( _VSTD::declval<_Args>()...))>static true_type __test_has_construct(int);_LIBCPP_SUPPRESS_DEPRECATED_POPtemplate <class _Alloc, class...>static false_type __test_has_construct(...);template <class _Alloc, class... _Args>struct __has_construct : decltype(__test_has_construct<_Alloc, _Args...>(0)) {};// 通过有没有`construct`进行dispatchtemplate <class _Tp, class... _Args>_LIBCPP_INLINE_VISIBILITY static void construct(allocator_type& __a, _Tp* __p, _Args&&... __args) { __construct(__has_construct<allocator_type, _Tp*, _Args...>(), __a, __p, _VSTD::forward<_Args>(__args)...);}template <class _Tp, class... _Args>_LIBCPP_INLINE_VISIBILITY static void __construct(true_type, allocator_type& __a, _Tp* __p, _Args&&... __args) { _LIBCPP_SUPPRESS_DEPRECATED_PUSH __a.construct(__p, _VSTD::forward<_Args>(__args)...); _LIBCPP_SUPPRESS_DEPRECATED_POP}// 通过这里可以看出是有默认初始化？template <class _Tp, class... _Args>_LIBCPP_INLINE_VISIBILITY static void __construct(false_type, allocator_type&, _Tp* __p, _Args&&... __args) { ::new ((void*)__p) _Tp(_VSTD::forward<_Args>(__args)...);} push_back方法  <class _Tp, class _Allocator>_LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_AFTER_CXX17 inline _LIBCPP_INLINE_VISIBILITY voidvector<_Tp, _Allocator>::push_back(const_reference __x) { if (this->__end_ != this->__end_cap()) { __construct_one_at_end(__x); } else __push_back_slow_path(__x);}template <class _Tp, class _Allocator>_LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_AFTER_CXX17 inline _LIBCPP_INLINE_VISIBILITY voidvector<_Tp, _Allocator>::push_back(value_type&& __x) { if (this->__end_ < this->__end_cap()) { __construct_one_at_end(_VSTD::move(__x)); } else __push_back_slow_path(_VSTD::move(__x));}// 如果容量够 直接push backstruct _ConstructTransaction { _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_AFTER_CXX17 explicit _ConstructTransaction(vector& __v, size_type __n) : __v_(__v), __pos_(__v.__end_), __new_end_(__v.__end_ + __n) {#ifndef _LIBCPP_HAS_NO_ASAN __v_.__annotate_increase(__n);#endif } _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_AFTER_CXX17 ~_ConstructTransaction() { __v_.__end_ = __pos_;#ifndef _LIBCPP_HAS_NO_ASAN if (__pos_ != __new_end_) { __v_.__annotate_shrink(__new_end_ - __v_.__begin_); }#endif } vector& __v_; pointer __pos_; const_pointer const __new_end_; private: _ConstructTransaction(_ConstructTransaction const&) = delete; _ConstructTransaction& operator=(_ConstructTransaction const&) = delete;};// _ConstructTransaction可以在construct失败的时候不影响vector的__end_的值template <class ..._Args>_LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_AFTER_CXX17 _LIBCPP_INLINE_VISIBILITYvoid __construct_one_at_end(_Args&& ...__args) { _ConstructTransaction __tx(*this, 1); __alloc_traits::construct(this->__alloc(), _VSTD::__to_address(__tx.__pos_), _VSTD::forward<_Args>(__args)...); ++__tx.__pos_;}// 如果容量不够template <class _Tp, class _Allocator>template <class _Up>_LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_AFTER_CXX17 voidvector<_Tp, _Allocator>::__push_back_slow_path(_Up&& __x) { allocator_type& __a = this->__alloc(); __split_buffer<value_type, allocator_type&> __v(__recommend(size() + 1), size(), __a); // __v.push_back(_VSTD::forward<_Up>(__x)); __alloc_traits::construct(__a, _VSTD::__to_address(__v.__end_), _VSTD::forward<_Up>(__x)); __v.__end_++; // 想办法把split_buffer的指针交换到当前vector上 __swap_out_circular_buffer(__v);}// split_buffer// __first_指向分配内存的起点 __end_cap指向终点template <class _Tp, class _Allocator>_LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_AFTER_CXX17 __split_buffer<_Tp, _Allocator>::__split_buffer( size_type __cap, size_type __start, __alloc_rr& __a) : __end_cap_(nullptr, __a) { if (__cap == 0) { __first_ = nullptr; } else { auto __allocation = std::__allocate_at_least(__alloc(), __cap); __first_ = __allocation.ptr; __cap = __allocation.count; } __begin_ = __end_ = __first_ + __start; __end_cap() = __first_ + __cap;}template <class _Tp, class _Allocator>_LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_AFTER_CXX17 voidvector<_Tp, _Allocator>::__swap_out_circular_buffer( __split_buffer<value_type, allocator_type&>& __v) { __annotate_delete(); using _RevIter = std::reverse_iterator<pointer>; __v.__begin_ = std::__uninitialized_allocator_move_if_noexcept( __alloc(), _RevIter(__end_), _RevIter(__begin_), _RevIter(__v.__begin_)) .base(); _VSTD::swap(this->__begin_, __v.__begin_); _VSTD::swap(this->__end_, __v.__end_); _VSTD::swap(this->__end_cap(), __v.__end_cap()); __v.__first_ = __v.__begin_; __annotate_new(size()); std::__debug_db_invalidate_all(this);}// Move-construct the elements [__first1, __last1) into [__first2, __first2 + N)// if the move constructor is noexcept, where N is distance(__first1, __last1).//// Otherwise try to copy all elements. If an exception is thrown the already// copied elements are destroyed in reverse order of their construction.template <class _Alloc, class _Iter1, class _Sent1, class _Iter2>_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_AFTER_CXX17 _Iter2__uninitialized_allocator_move_if_noexcept(_Alloc &__alloc, _Iter1 __first1, _Sent1 __last1, _Iter2 __first2) { static_assert(__is_cpp17_move_insertable<_Alloc>::value, "The specified type does not meet the requirements of " "Cpp17MoveInsertable");#ifndef _LIBCPP_NO_EXCEPTIONS auto __destruct_first = __first2; try {#endif while (__first1 != __last1) {#ifndef _LIBCPP_NO_EXCEPTIONS allocator_traits<_Alloc>::construct(__alloc, std::__to_address(__first2), std::move_if_noexcept(*__first1));#else allocator_traits<_Alloc>::construct(__alloc, std::__to_address(__first2), std::move(*__first1));#endif ++__first1; ++__first2; }#ifndef _LIBCPP_NO_EXCEPTIONS } catch (...) { _AllocatorDestroyRangeReverse<_Alloc, _Iter2>(__alloc, __destruct_first, __first2)(); throw; }#endif return __first2;}// 调用placement newtemplate <class _Alloc, class _Iter1, class _Iter2, class _Type = typename iterator_traits<_Iter1>::value_type, class = __enable_if_t< is_trivially_move_constructible<_Type>::value && is_trivially_move_assignable<_Type>::value && __allocator_has_trivial_move_construct<_Alloc, _Type>::value> >_LIBCPP_HIDE_FROM_ABI _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_AFTER_CXX17 _Iter2__uninitialized_allocator_move_if_noexcept(_Alloc &, _Iter1 __first1, _Iter1 __last1, _Iter2 __first2) { if (__libcpp_is_constant_evaluated()) { while (__first1 != __last1) { std::__construct_at(std::__to_address(__first2), std::move(*__first1)); ++__first1; ++__first2; } return __first2; } else { return std::move(__first1, __last1, __first2); }} clear方法12345678910111213141516void __base_destruct_at_end(pointer __new_last) _NOEXCEPT { pointer __soon_to_be_end = this->__end_; while (__new_last != __soon_to_be_end) __alloc_traits::destroy(__alloc(), std::__to_address(--__soon_to_be_end)); this->__end_ = __new_last;}void __clear() _NOEXCEPT { __base_destruct_at_end(this->__begin_);}void clear() _NOEXCEPT { size_type __old_size = size(); __clear(); __annotate_shrink(__old_size);} FAQ1. swap()和clear()clear()方法 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344template <class _Tp, __enable_if_t<!is_array<_Tp>::value, int> = 0>void __destroy_at(_Tp* __loc) { _LIBCPP_ASSERT_NON_NULL(__loc != nullptr, "null pointer given to destroy_at"); __loc->~_Tp();}#if _LIBCPP_STD_VER >= 20template <class _Tp, __enable_if_t<is_array<_Tp>::value, int> = 0>void __destroy_at(_Tp* __loc) { _LIBCPP_ASSERT_NON_NULL(__loc != nullptr, "null pointer given to destroy_at"); std::__destroy(std::begin(*__loc), std::end(*__loc));}#endif// 有allocator_type.destroy(_Tp*)的函数template <class _Tp, class = __enable_if_t<__has_destroy<allocator_type, _Tp*>::value> >static void destroy(allocator_type& __a, _Tp* __p) { __a.destroy(__p);}// 无allocator_type.destroy(_Tp*)的函数template <class _Tp, class = void, class = __enable_if_t<!__has_destroy<allocator_type, _Tp*>::value> >static void destroy(allocator_type&, _Tp* __p) { std::__destroy_at(__p);}// 析构__new_last到this->__end_之间的对象void __base_destruct_at_end(pointer __new_last) _NOEXCEPT { pointer __soon_to_be_end = this->__end_; while (__new_last != __soon_to_be_end) __alloc_traits::destroy(__alloc(), std::__to_address(--__soon_to_be_end)); this->__end_ = __new_last;}void __clear() _NOEXCEPT { __base_destruct_at_end(this->__begin_);}void clear() _NOEXCEPT { size_type __old_size = size(); __clear(); __annotate_shrink(__old_size);} 析构函数 1234567891011121314~vector() { __destroy_vector (*this)(); }class __destroy_vector {public: __destroy_vector(vector& __vec) : __vec_(__vec) {} void operator()() { if (__vec_.__begin_ != nullptr) __storage_traits::deallocate(__vec_.__alloc(), __vec_.__begin_, __vec_.__cap()); }private: vector& __vec_;};

STL之算法1. lower_boundmax_element 需要注意max_element返回的是迭代器。 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425template <class _ForwardIterator, class _Compare>_LIBCPP_NODISCARD_EXT inline _LIBCPP_INLINE_VISIBILITY _LIBCPP_CONSTEXPR_AFTER_CXX11 _ForwardIterator max_element(_ForwardIterator __first, _ForwardIterator __last, _Compare __comp) { static_assert(__is_cpp17_forward_iterator<_ForwardIterator>::value, "std::max_element requires a ForwardIterator"); STL之deque1. Block的大小对于deque<T>，如果sizeof<T>小于256，那么block的大小就是4096 / sizeof(T),否则就是16。 __deque_block_size定义 1234template <class _ValueType, class _DiffType>struct __deque_block_size { static const _DiffType value = sizeof(_ValueType) < 256 ? 4096 / sizeof(_ValueType) : 16;}; 1234template <class _Tp, class _Allocator>const typename __deque_base<_Tp, _Allocator>::difference_type __deque_base<_Tp, _Allocator>::__block_size = __deque_block_size<value_type, difference_type>::value; 2. 构造函数12345template <class _Tp, class _Allocator>deque<_Tp, _Allocator>::deque(size_type __n) { if (__n > 0) __append(__n);} __append函数 123456789101112131415template <class _Tp, class _Allocator>void deque<_Tp, _Allocator>::__append(size_type __n) { allocator_type& __a = __base::__alloc(); // 计算剩余的空间 size_type __back_capacity = __back_spare(); if (__n > __back_capacity) __add_back_capacity(__n - __back_capacity); // __n <= __back_capacity for (__deque_block_range __br : __deque_range(__base::end(), __base::end() + __n)) { _ConstructTransaction __tx(this, __br); for (; __tx.__pos_ != __tx.__end_; ++__tx.__pos_) { __alloc_traits::construct(__a, std::__to_address(__tx.__pos_)); } }} 重点看下__back_spare函数如何计算剩余空间。 123size_type __back_spare() const { return __capacity() - (__base::__start_ + __base::size());} __capacity函数 __base::__map_是一个__split_buffer结构。 思考：这个地方为什么要减去1。 1234size_type __capacity() const { return __base::__map_.size() == 0 ? 0 : __base::__map_.size() * __base::__block_size - 1;} 添加容量的函数 也就是说__base::__start_是总的front empty的数量，只需要pop_front一次，__base::__start_就加1。 1234_LIBCPP_INLINE_VISIBILITYsize_type __front_spare() const { return __base::__start_;} 通过pop_front验证下 12345678910template <class _Tp, class _Allocator>void deque<_Tp, _Allocator>::pop_front() { allocator_type& __a = __base::__alloc(); __alloc_traits::destroy(__a, __to_address(*(__base::__map_.begin() + __base::__start_ / __base::__block_size) + __base::__start_ % __base::__block_size)); --__base::size(); ++__base::__start_; __maybe_remove_front_spare();} __recommend_blocks计算添加几个block合适。后面的求余数是为了弥补__n / __base::__block_size等于0的情况，也就是说至少要一个block只要n不等于0。 123static size_type __recommend_blocks(size_type __n) { return __n / __base::__block_size + (__n % __base::__block_size != 0);} __add_back_capacity往后增加 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970717273747576777879808182838485// Create back capacity for __n elements.// Strong guarantee. Either do it or don't touch anything.template <class _Tp, class _Allocator>voiddeque<_Tp, _Allocator>::__add_back_capacity(size_type __n) { allocator_type& __a = __base::__alloc(); size_type __nb = __recommend_blocks(__n + __base::__map_.empty()); // Number of unused blocks at front: size_type __front_capacity = __front_spare() / __base::__block_size; __front_capacity = _VSTD::min(__front_capacity, __nb); // don't take more than you need __nb -= __front_capacity; // number of blocks need to allocate // If __nb == 0, then we have sufficient capacity. if (__nb == 0) { __base::__start_ -= __base::__block_size * __front_capacity; for (; __front_capacity > 0; --__front_capacity) { pointer __pt = __base::__map_.front(); __base::__map_.pop_front(); __base::__map_.push_back(__pt); } } // Else if __nb <= __map_.capacity() - __map_.size() then we need to allocate __nb buffers else if (__nb <= __base::__map_.capacity() - __base::__map_.size()) { // we can put the new buffers into the map, but don't shift things around // until all buffers are allocated. If we throw, we don't need to fix // anything up (any added buffers are undetectible) for (; __nb > 0; --__nb) { if (__base::__map_.__back_spare() == 0) break; __base::__map_.push_back(__alloc_traits::allocate(__a, __base::__block_size)); } for (; __nb > 0; --__nb, ++__front_capacity, __base::__start_ += __base::__block_size - (__base::__map_.size() == 1)) __base::__map_.push_front(__alloc_traits::allocate(__a, __base::__block_size)); // Done allocating, reorder capacity __base::__start_ -= __base::__block_size * __front_capacity; for (; __front_capacity > 0; --__front_capacity) { pointer __pt = __base::__map_.front(); __base::__map_.pop_front(); __base::__map_.push_back(__pt); } } // Else need to allocate __nb buffers, *and* we need to reallocate __map_. else { size_type __ds = __front_capacity * __base::__block_size; __split_buffer<pointer, typename __base::__pointer_allocator&> __buf(max<size_type>(2* __base::__map_.capacity(), __nb + __base::__map_.size()), __base::__map_.size() - __front_capacity, __base::__map_.__alloc());#ifndef _LIBCPP_NO_EXCEPTIONS try {#endif // _LIBCPP_NO_EXCEPTIONS for (; __nb > 0; --__nb) __buf.push_back(__alloc_traits::allocate(__a, __base::__block_size));#ifndef _LIBCPP_NO_EXCEPTIONS } catch (...) { for (typename __base::__map_pointer __i = __buf.begin(); __i != __buf.end(); ++__i) __alloc_traits::deallocate(__a, *__i, __base::__block_size); throw; }#endif // _LIBCPP_NO_EXCEPTIONS for (; __front_capacity > 0; --__front_capacity) { __buf.push_back(__base::__map_.front()); __base::__map_.pop_front(); } for (typename __base::__map_pointer __i = __base::__map_.end(); __i != __base::__map_.begin();) __buf.push_front(*--__i); _VSTD::swap(__base::__map_.__first_, __buf.__first_); _VSTD::swap(__base::__map_.__begin_, __buf.__begin_); _VSTD::swap(__base::__map_.__end_, __buf.__end_); _VSTD::swap(__base::__map_.__end_cap(), __buf.__end_cap()); __base::__start_ -= __ds; }} 3. 辅助结构__to_address函数 12345678910111213template <class _Tp>inline_Tp* __to_address(_Tp* __p) _NOEXCEPT { static_assert(!is_function<_Tp>::value, "_Tp is a function type"); return __p;}template <class _Pointer>inlinetypename __choose_to_address<_Pointer>::template __return_type<_Pointer>__to_address(const _Pointer& __p) _NOEXCEPT { return __choose_to_address<_Pointer>::__do_it(__p);}

raft1. 为什么要学习raft？ 学习共识算法 2. 目前对raft的了解程度2.1 raft角色在raft共识算法中，有3种角色 Leader Candidate Follower 2.2 角色转变​ 开始，所有节点都是Follower。每个节点会有一个随机的定时器。如果在这个时间之内没有收到Leader的消息，Follower角色变成Candidate。这个时候每个候选者就开始为自己拉票了，给所有其他的节点发送Request Vote请求。其他节点在收到Request Vote请求之后会基于一定的条件选择拒绝还是同意（看下文）。需要注意每个节点最多只能投票给其中一个人。每个Request Vote的发起者肯定厚颜无耻的投给了自己。假设有5个节点，每个candidate只需要拿到其他两个节点的票加上自己的一票就可以称为Leader了（$2+1 > 5/2$多数派原理）。如果在一个任期内没有选出Leader，会继续开始下一届选举（任期数加1）。需要注意，节点如果在上一个任期给其他节点投过票，在新的任期可以重新投票。 Case第1轮选举当前任期：2 节点$S_4$收到投票：{$S_4, S_1$} 节点$S_2$收到投票：{$S_2, S_5$} 没有节点收到半数以上的票，开始新的选举。 第2轮选举节点$S_5$遥遥领先。 当前任期：3 节点$S_5$收到半数以上的投票，成为Leader。 2.3 角色转换图 3. Hashicorp raft源码分析初始状态是Follower。 1234567891011121314// file: api.go// NewRaft is used to construct a new Raft node. It takes a configuration, as well// as implementations of various interfaces that are required. If we have any// old state, such as snapshots, logs, peers, etc, all those will be restored// when creating the Raft node.func NewRaft(conf *Config, fsm FSM, logs LogStore, stable StableStore, snaps SnapshotStore, trans Transport) (*Raft, error) { ... // Initialize as a follower. r.setState(Follower) ...} 心跳包期间如果没有收到Leader的小心，从Follower转变成Candidate。 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546// runFollower runs the FSM for a follower.func (r *Raft) runFollower() { ... heartbeatTimer := randomTimeout(r.conf.HeartbeatTimeout) for r.getState() == Follower { select { ... case <-heartbeatTimer: // Restart the heartbeat timer heartbeatTimer = randomTimeout(r.conf.HeartbeatTimeout) // Check if we have had a successful contact lastContact := r.LastContact() if time.Now().Sub(lastContact) < r.conf.HeartbeatTimeout { continue } // Heartbeat failed! Transition to the candidate state lastLeader := r.Leader() r.setLeader("") if r.configurations.latestIndex == 0 { if !didWarn { r.logger.Warn("no known peers, aborting election") didWarn = true } } else if r.configurations.latestIndex == r.configurations.committedIndex && !hasVote(r.configurations.latest, r.localID) { if !didWarn { r.logger.Warn("not part of stable configuration, aborting election") didWarn = true } } else { r.logger.Warn(fmt.Sprintf("Heartbeat timeout from %q reached, starting election", lastLeader)) metrics.IncrCounter([]string{"raft", "transition", "heartbeat_timeout"}, 1) r.setState(Candidate) return } case <-r.shutdownCh: return } }} 日志复制领导选举结束后，可以开始服务客户端的请求。客户端发送命令（例如x=2）给raft模块，Leader会将命令添加到自己的日志中。然后开始通知其他节点复制这条日志（并行）。 思考1：日志的格式应该是怎么样的。对于x=2这样一条命令，日志格式应该是怎么样的。 思考2：如果对于读请求，例如读取x的值，是否有必要将它写入到日志。 思考3：如果Leader在等待其他节点的回复始终少于一半 应该怎么办？是一直等待么。 思考4：Leader收到客户端的请求，这条命令还在内存中，是先将它持久化到日志中还是等待多数的replicate之后再持久化到日志中。之后通过appendEntries或者heartbeat请求，其他节点才将这条日志持久化。如果这个时候Leader crash了，有没有影响。 在论文3.5节（P36）中提到 If followers crash or run slowly, or if network packets are lost, the leader retries AppendEntries RPCs indefinitely (even after it has responded to the client) until all followers eventally store all log entries. ![log](/Users/zlh/Documents/Distributed System/Note/log.png) ![figure3.2](/Users/zlh/Documents/Distributed System/Note/figure3.2.png) 思考：关于Leader Completeness。如果一条日志在某个任期提交了（这个地方是不是应该强调是Leader的提交而不是其他节点的提交），那么这条日志一定会出现在更高任期领导者的日志中？ 假设有A，B，C，D，E一共5个节点，其中A是Leader。 所以Leader在发送AppendEntries请求给其他节点。其他节点是立刻持久化到日志中。Leader只有收到多数节点的TRUE回复之后，才会持久化到他自己的日志中。假如只有C成功持久化这条日志了，如果这个时候Leader crash了。那么会开始新的一轮选举，因为C的任期和日志长度，B，D和E是没有机会得到Leader的？如果A crash之后，同时网络出现了分区。B、D和E为一个区而C单独一个区，那么之前C持久化的命令是否有问题？ snapshot需要保存什么 12345678910111213141516// file: raft/raftpb/raft.protomessage SnapshotMetadata { optional ConfState conf_state = 1 [(gogoproto.nullable) = false]; optional uint64 index = 2 [(gogoproto.nullable) = false]; optional uint64 term = 3 [(gogoproto.nullable) = false];}message Snapshot { optional bytes data = 1; optional SnapshotMetadata metadata = 2 [(gogoproto.nullable) = false];}message ConfState { repeated uint64 nodes = 1;} 复制状态机 相同的初始状态+相同的输入=相同的结束状态 多个节点上，从相同的初始状态开始，执行相同的一串命令，产生相同的最终状态。 在Raft中，leader将客户端请求（command）封装到一个个log entry中，将这些log entries复制到所有follow节点，然后大家按相同顺序应用log entries中的command，根据复制状态机的理论，大家的结束状态肯定是一致的。 可以说，我们使用共识算法，就是为了实现复制状态机。一个分布式场景下的各节点间，就是通过共识算法来保证命令序列的一致，从而始终保持它们的状态一致，从而实现高可用的。（投票选主使一种特殊的命令） 这里所谓拓展一点，复制状态机的功能可以更加强大。比如两个副本一个采用行存储的数据结构存储数据，另一个采用列存储，只要它们初始数据相同，并持续发给他们相同的命令，那么同一时刻从两个副本中读取到的结果也是一样的，这就是一种HTAP的实现方法（比如TiDB）。 状态简化 在任何时刻，每一个服务器节点都处于leader，follower或candidate这三个状态之一。 相比于Paxos，这一点就极大简化了算法的实现，因为Raft只需考虑状态的切换，而不用像Paxos那样考虑状态之间的共存和互相影响。 Raft把时间分割成任意长度的任期（term），任期用连续的整数标记。 每一段任期从一次选举开始。在某些情况下，一次选举无法选出leader（比如两个节点收到了相同的票数），在这种情况下，这一任期会以没有leader结束；一个新的任期（包含一次新的选举）会很快重新开始。Raft保证在任意一个任期内，最多只有一个leader。 选举新的领导者：在Raft协议中，领导者的选举是通过选举超时和投票来实现的。每个节点都有一个当前的任期号，节点会在选举超时后开始选举过程，递增当前的任期号，并发送请求投票消息给其他节点。通过更新任期号，可以触发新一轮的选举，选出新的领导者。 防止过时的领导者产生冲突：如果一个过时的领导者（例如，任期号较小的领导者）试图在网络分区或故障恢复后继续操作，可能会与其他节点的领导者发生冲突，导致数据的不一致。通过更新任期号，可以防止过时的领导者继续操作，并确保新的领导者在网络重新连接后能够正确地处理请求。 提供一致的视图：任期号用于标识一个特定的任期，所有节点都通过任期号来维护一致的视图。当一个节点接收到具有较新任期号的请求时，它会更新自己的任期号，以确保所有节点都具有相同的任期号，并且能够按照相同的规则进行操作。 安全性和一致性保证：更新任期号有助于确保Raft协议的安全性和一致性。通过在每个任期中进行领导者选举，保证了领导者的合法性和合理性。同时，通过在任期号上达成一致，可以避免多个领导者同时存在，从而维持一致的操作和数据状态。 总而言之，更新任期号在Raft协议中是为了维护领导者的稳定性和一致性，并提供安全性保证。通过更新任期号，可以触发选举过程、防止过时的领导者产生冲突、提供一致的视图，并确保协议的正常运行。 Raft算法中服务器节点之间使用RPC进行通信，并且Raft只有两种主要的RPC： RequestVote RPC（请求投票）: 由candidate在选举期间发起。 AppendEntries RPC（追加条目）：由leader发起，用来复制日志和提供一条心跳机制。 服务器之间通信的时候会交换当前任期号；如果一个服务器上的当前任期号比其他的小，该服务器会将自己的任期号更新为较大的那个值。 如果一个candidate或者leader发现自己的任期号过期了，它会立即回到follower状态。 如果一个节点接收到一个包含过期的任期号的请求，它会直接拒绝这个请求。 领导者选举 Raft内部有一种心跳机制，如果存在leader，那么它就会周期性的向所有follower发送心跳，来维持自己的地位。如果follower一段时间没有收到心跳，那么它就会认为系统中没有可用的leader，然后开始进行选举。 开始一个选举过程后，follower先增加自己的当前任期号，并转换为candidate状态。然后投票给自己，并且并行的向集群中的其他服务器节点发送投票请求（RequestVote RPC）。 日志复制 安全性 集群成员变更 总结与性能测试 Raft本身是一个状态机9。 State 12345678910111213141516type raft struct { id uint64 Term uint64 Vote uint64 ... raftLog *raftLog // replicated WAL ... state StateType // Leader, Candidate, Follower ...}type stepFunc func(r *raft, m pb.Message) errorfunc stepLeader(r *raft, m pb.Message) errorfunc stepFollower(r *raft, m pb.Message) errorfunc stepCandidate(r *raft, m pb.Message) error Input 123456789type Message struct { Type MessageType To uint64 From uint64 Term uint64 LogTerm uint64 Index uint64 Entries []Entry} 1. 伪代码实现【4】1.1 初始化123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839on initialization do currentTerm := 0; votedFor := null; log := []; commitedLength := 0; currentRole := follower; currentLeader := null; votesReceived := {}; sentLength := <>; ackedLength := <>;end onon recovery from crash do currentRole := follower; currentLeader := null; votesReceived := {}; sentLength := []; ackedLength := [];end onon node nodeId suspects leader has failed, or on election timeout do currentTerm := currentTerm + 1; currentRole := candiate; votedFor := nodeId; votesReceived := {nodeId}; lastTerm := 0; if log.length > 0 then lastTerm := log[log.length - 1].term; end if // TODO: 为什么要发送log的长度和最后一个任期 msg := (VoteRequest, nodeId, currentTerm, log.length, lastTerm) for each node ∈ nodes then send msg to node; end for start election timer;end on 1.2 接收到Vote请求12345678910111213141516171819202122on receiving (VoteRequest, cId, cTerm, cLogLength, cLogTerm) if cTerm > currentTerm then currentTerm := cTerm; // TODO: 不管当前是什么角色都改成follower currentRole := follower; votedFor := null; end if lastTerm := 0; if log.length > 0 then lastTerm := log[log.length - 1].term; end if // TODO: we don't want outdated log to become the leader logOk := (cLogTerm > lastTerm) or (cLogTerm = lastTerm and cLogLength >= log.length); if cTerm = currentTerm and logOk and votedFor ∈ {cId, null} then votedFor := cId; send (VoteResponse, nodeId, currentTerm, true) to node cId else send (VoteResponse, nodeId, currentTerm, false) to node cId end ifend on 1.3 收集投票信息123456789101112131415161718192021on receiving (VoteResponse, voterId, term, granted) at nodeId do if currentRole = candidate and term = currentTerm and granted then votesReceived := votesReceived ∪ {voterId}; if |votesReceived| >= ⌈(|nodes| + 1)/2⌉ then currentRole := leader; currentLeader := nodeId; cancel election timer; for each follower ∈ nodes \ {nodeId} do sentLength[follower] := log.length; ackedLength[follower] := 0; REPLICATELOG(nodeId, follower); end for end if else if term > currentTerm then currentTerm := term; currentRole := follower; votedFor := null; cancel election timer; end ifend on 1.4 广播消息：broadcasting messages12345678910111213141516171819on request to broadcast msg at node nodeId do if currentRole = leader then append the record (msg: msg, term: currentTerm) to log; ackedLength[nodeId] := log.length; for each follower ∈ nodes \ {nodeId} do REPLICATELOG(nodeId, follower); end for else forward the request to currentLeader via a FIFO link; end ifend onperiodically at node nodeId do if currentRole = leadr then for each follower ∈ nodes \ {nodeId} do REPLICATELOG(nodeId, follower); end for end ifend do 1.5 replicating from leader to followers​ Called on the leader whenever there is a new message in the log, and also periodically. If there are no new messages, suffix is the empty list. LogRequest messages with suffix = <> serve as heartbeats, letting followers know that the leader is still alive. 1234567891011function REPLICATELOG(leaderId, followerId) prefixLen := sentLength[followerId]; suffix := <log[prefixLen], log[prefixLen + 1], ..., log[log.length - 1]>; prefixTerm := 0; if prefixLen > 0 then prefixTerm := log[prefixLen - 1].term end if send (LogRequest, leaderId, currentTerm, prefixLen, prefixTerm, commitLength, suffix) to followerIdend function followers receiving message 1234on receiving (LogRequest, leaderId, term, prefixLen, prefixTerm, leaderCommit, suffix) at node nodeId doend on 分布式共识算法(consensus algorithm)通常的做法就是在多个节点上复制状态机。分布在不同服务器上的状态机执行着相同的状态变化，即使其中几台机器挂掉，整个集群还能继续运作。 复制状态机正确运行的核心的同步日志，日志是保证各节点状态同步的关键，日志中保存了一系列状态机命令，共识算法的核心是保证这些不同节点上的日志以相同的顺序保存相同的命令，由于状态机是确定的，所以相同的命令以相同的顺序执行，会得到相同的结果。 1. 日志压缩1.1 为什么需要日志压缩​ Raft’s log grows during normal operation as it incorporates more client requests. As it grows larger, it occupies more space and takes more time to replay. Without some way to compact the log, this will eventually cause availability problems: servers will either run out of space, or they will take too long to start. Thus, some form of log compaction is necessary for any practical system.（原论文p66） 优化 参考 Raft优化之PreVote FAQ 1. Raft leaders commit a no-op entry at the beginning of their termno-op 日志即只有 index 和 term 信息，command 信息为空。也是要写到磁盘存储的。 具体流程是在 Leader 刚选举成功的时候，立即追加一条 no-op 日志，并立即复制到其它节点，no-op 日志一经提交，Leader 前面那些未提交的日志全部间接提交，问题就解决了。像上面的 kv 数据库，有了 no-op 日志之后，Leader 就能快速响应客户端查询了。 本质上，no-op 日志使 Leader 隐式地快速提交之前任期未提交的日志，确认当前 commitIndex，这样系统才会快速对外正常工作。 参考 Raft 的 Figure 8 讲了什么问题？为什么需要 no-op 日志？ 节点收到消息先判断Term还是Message Type 这是因为 Raft 算法的核心思想是基于任期（Term）的选举和领导者的角色确定。在任一给定的任期内，只有一个领导者可以被选举出来，其他节点则处于跟随者（Follower）状态。因此，处理消息时首先要确认消息的 Term 是否比当前节点的 Term 大。如果消息的 Term 比当前节点小，说明该消息可能是过期的，可以忽略。如果消息的 Term 比当前节点大，那么当前节点需要更新自己的 Term，并且切换到跟随者状态。 在确认 Term 合适后，才会考虑消息的 Type。Raft 消息的类型通常包括： Request Vote（选举投票请求）： 如果收到的消息是选举投票请求，那么节点会根据一定的规则（如候选者的 Term 大于等于自己的 Term）来判断是否投票给该候选者。 Append Entries（日志追加请求）： 如果收到的消息是日志追加请求，通常需要对消息中的信息进行验证，如比较日志的索引和任期等。如果验证通过，跟随者会将该消息中的日志追加到自己的日志中。 Response（响应消息）： 对于领导者发送的请求，收到的是对应的响应消息。领导者会根据响应来判断是否需要继续发送数据或者执行其他操作。 总之，首要的是通过消息的 Term 来判断是否需要更新节点状态，并在 Term 适当的情况下，根据消息的类型来执行相应的操作。这个处理流程保证了算法的正确性和一致性。 etcd中raft实践1234567891011121314151617// file: raftexample/main.gofunc main() { ... proposeC := make(chan string) defer close(proposeC) confChangeC := make(chan raftpb.ConfChange) defer close(confChangeC) // raft provides a commit stream for the proposals from the http api var kvs *kvstore getSnapshot := func() ([]byte, error) { return kvs.getSnapshot() } commitC, errorC, snapshotterReady := newRaftNode( *id, strings.Split(*cluster, ","), *join, getSnapshot, proposeC, confChangeC ) kvs = newKVStore(<-snapshotterReady, proposeC, commitC, errorC)} 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111112113114115116117118119120121122123124125126127128129130// file: raftexample/raft.go// A key-value stream backed by rafttype raftNode struct { proposeC <-chan string // proposed messages (k,v) confChangeC <-chan raftpb.ConfChange // proposed cluster config changes commitC chan<- *string // entries committed to log (k,v) errorC chan<- error // errors from raft session id int // client ID for raft session peers []string // raft peer URLs join bool // node is joining an existing cluster waldir string // path to WAL directory snapdir string // path to snapshot directory getSnapshot func() ([]byte, error) lastIndex uint64 // index of log at start confState raftpb.ConfState snapshotIndex uint64 appliedIndex uint64 // raft backing for the commit/error channel node raft.Node raftStorage *raft.MemoryStorage wal *wal.WAL snapshotter *snap.Snapshotter snapshotterReady chan *snap.Snapshotter // signals when snapshotter is ready snapCount uint64 transport *rafthttp.Transport stopc chan struct{} // signals proposal channel closed httpstopc chan struct{} // signals http server to shutdown httpdonec chan struct{} // signals http server shutdown complete}// newRaftNode initiates a raft instance and returns a committed log entry// channel and error channel. Proposals for log updates are sent over the// provided the proposal channel. All log entries are replayed over the// commit channel, followed by a nil message (to indicate the channel is// current), then new log entries. To shutdown, close proposeC and read errorC.func newRaftNode(id int, peers []string, join bool, getSnapshot func() ([]byte, error), proposeC <-chan string, confChangeC <-chan raftpb.ConfChange) (<-chan *string, <-chan error, <-chan *snap.Snapshotter) { commitC := make(chan *string) errorC := make(chan error) rc := &raftNode{ proposeC: proposeC, confChangeC: confChangeC, commitC: commitC, errorC: errorC, id: id, peers: peers, join: join, waldir: fmt.Sprintf("raftexample-%d", id), snapdir: fmt.Sprintf("raftexample-%d-snap", id), getSnapshot: getSnapshot, snapCount: defaultSnapCount, stopc: make(chan struct{}), httpstopc: make(chan struct{}), httpdonec: make(chan struct{}), snapshotterReady: make(chan *snap.Snapshotter, 1), // rest of structure populated after WAL replay } go rc.startRaft() return commitC, errorC, rc.snapshotterReady}// 核心是startRaft方法func (rc *raftNode) startRaft() { // 如果存放快照的目录不存在则创建 if !fileutil.Exist(rc.snapdir) { if err := os.Mkdir(rc.snapdir, 0750); err != nil { log.Fatalf("raftexample: cannot create dir for snapshot (%v)", err) } } rc.snapshotter = snap.New(rc.snapdir) // 这个时候<-snapshotterReady就可以返回 rc.snapshotterReady <- rc.snapshotter oldwal := wal.Exist(rc.waldir) rc.wal = rc.replayWAL() rpeers := make([]raft.Peer, len(rc.peers)) for i := range rpeers { rpeers[i] = raft.Peer{ID: uint64(i + 1)} } c := &raft.Config{ ID: uint64(rc.id), ElectionTick: 10, HeartbeatTick: 1, Storage: rc.raftStorage, MaxSizePerMsg: 1024 * 1024, MaxInflightMsgs: 256, } if oldwal { rc.node = raft.RestartNode(c) } else { startPeers := rpeers if rc.join { startPeers = nil } rc.node = raft.StartNode(c, startPeers) } ss := &stats.ServerStats{} ss.Initialize() rc.transport = &rafthttp.Transport{ ID: types.ID(rc.id), ClusterID: 0x1000, Raft: rc, ServerStats: ss, LeaderStats: stats.NewLeaderStats(strconv.Itoa(rc.id)), ErrorC: make(chan error), } rc.transport.Start() for i := range rc.peers { if i+1 != rc.id { rc.transport.AddPeer(types.ID(i+1), []string{rc.peers[i]}) } } go rc.serveRaft() go rc.serveChannels()} replayWAL 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061func (rc *raftNode) loadSnapshot() *raftpb.Snapshot { snapshot, err := rc.snapshotter.Load() if err != nil && err != snap.ErrNoSnapshot { log.Fatalf("raftexample: error loading snapshot (%v)", err) } return snapshot}// openWAL returns a WAL ready for reading.func (rc *raftNode) openWAL(snapshot *raftpb.Snapshot) *wal.WAL { if !wal.Exist(rc.waldir) { if err := os.Mkdir(rc.waldir, 0750); err != nil { log.Fatalf("raftexample: cannot create dir for wal (%v)", err) } w, err := wal.Create(rc.waldir, nil) if err != nil { log.Fatalf("raftexample: create wal error (%v)", err) } w.Close() } walsnap := walpb.Snapshot{} if snapshot != nil { walsnap.Index, walsnap.Term = snapshot.Metadata.Index, snapshot.Metadata.Term } log.Printf("loading WAL at term %d and index %d", walsnap.Term, walsnap.Index) w, err := wal.Open(rc.waldir, walsnap) if err != nil { log.Fatalf("raftexample: error loading wal (%v)", err) } return w}// replayWAL replays WAL entries into the raft instance.func (rc *raftNode) replayWAL() *wal.WAL { log.Printf("replaying WAL of member %d", rc.id) snapshot := rc.loadSnapshot() w := rc.openWAL(snapshot) _, st, ents, err := w.ReadAll() if err != nil { log.Fatalf("raftexample: failed to read WAL (%v)", err) } rc.raftStorage = raft.NewMemoryStorage() if snapshot != nil { rc.raftStorage.ApplySnapshot(*snapshot) } rc.raftStorage.SetHardState(st) // append to storage so raft starts at the right place in log rc.raftStorage.Append(ents) // send nil once lastIndex is published so client knows commit channel is current if len(ents) > 0 { rc.lastIndex = ents[len(ents)-1].Index } else { rc.commitC <- nil } return w} Etcd WAL关键流程分析 参考 https://raft.github.io/ https://thesecretlivesofdata.com/raft/ http://www.hollischuang.com/archives/666 youtube.com/watch?v=uXEYuDwm7e4&t=554s https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=64Zp3tzNbpE&list=PLrw6a1wE39_tb2fErI4-WkMbsvGQk9_UB&index=6 别再怀疑自己的智商了，Raft协议本来就不好理解 Lecture 6: Fault Tolerance: Raft (1) Applying Flexible Paxos To Raft Deep Dive: etcd - Jingyi Hu, Google etcd Raft库解析
条件变量条件变量必须得有notify，不然即使等待的条件为假，它还是继续等待。 参考 https://blog.csdn.net/iLuoPu/article/details/122328411
